query:
SELECT 
  u.name AS rep_name,
  p.id AS project_id,
  p.name AS project_name,
  p.priority,
  p.location,
  p.value,
  p.stage,
  p.actionTier,
  p.owner,
  p.sector,
  p.suppressed,
  p.discoveryStatus,
  p.lastDiscoveryAt,
  p.discoveryAttempts
FROM users u
JOIN userProfiles up ON up.userId = u.id
JOIN projects p ON (
  p.priority IN ('hot', 'warm')
  AND p.suppressed = 0
  AND (
    JSON_CONTAINS(up.territories, JSON_QUOTE(p.location), '$')
    OR JSON_CONTAINS(up.territories, '"NATIONAL"', '$')
    OR JSON_CONTAINS(up.territories, '"National"', '$')
  )
)
WHERE u.name IN ('Ryan Pemberton', 'Brett Hansen', 'Daniel Zec', 'Dan Day', 'Amit Bhargava', 'Leo Williams ')
  AND u.role = 'user'
  AND p.actionTier IN ('tier1_actionable', 'tier2_warm')
ORDER BY u.name, p.priority DESC, p.actionTier ASC
LIMIT 60;

SELECT

  p.id AS project_id,
  p.name AS project_name,
  p.priority,
  p.location,
  p.value,
  p.stage,
  p.actionTier,
  p.owner,
  p.sector,
  p.suppressed,
  p.discoveryStatus,
  p.lastDiscoveryAt,
  p.discoveryAttempts
FROM users u
JOIN userProfiles up ON up.userId = u.id
JOIN projects p ON (
  p.priority IN ('hot', 'warm')
  AND p.suppressed = 0
  AND (
    JSON_CONTAINS(up.territories, JSON_QUOTE(p.location), '$')
    OR JSON_CONTAINS(up.territories, '"NATIONAL"', '$')
    OR JSON_CONTAINS(up.territories, '"National"', '$')
  )
)
WHERE u.name IN ('Ryan Pemberton', 'Brett Hansen', 'Daniel Zec', 'Dan Day', 'Amit Bhargava', 'Leo Williams ')
  AND u.role = 'user'
  AND p.actionTier IN ('tier1_actionable', 'tier2_warm')
ORDER BY u.name, p.priority DESC, p.actionTier ASC
LIMIT 60;
